name: A Folio in the Stacks
description: Your scholars turn up a water-stained folio in the Library — fragments of old lore on the nature of the dark.

choices.label: Copy it for the archives
choices.description: Slow work, but it spreads the hold's renown among the learned.

name: The Bubbling Cauldron
description: An experiment in the Alchemist's workshop has filled the halls with a strange, sweet smoke.

choices.label: Bottle the draught
choices.description: Whatever it is, the people could use a tonic.

choices.label: Let the herbalist test it first
choices.description: Better a careful sip than a poisoned hall.

name: A Wealthy Caravan
description: Word of your Market has drawn a well-laden caravan to the gates, eager to deal.

choices.label: Buy timber and stone
choices.description: Stock the yards for the building season.

name: Deep Delving
description: The miners report a rich vein deeper than they've cut before — but the rock above it groans.

choices.label: Chase the vein at speed
choices.description: The ore is worth the gamble — or it isn't.

name: Vigil for the Fallen
description: The hold gathers at the Graveyard to honor those lost to the long war. The rite steadies grieving hearts.

choices.label: Keep the vigil through the night

name: Arcane Resonance
description: The Wizard Tower thrums with a tide of loose power drawn in from the rifts. It will not last — best used now.

choices.label: Bind the surge into residue
choices.description: Capture the power for the enchanter's bench.

choices.label: Turn it against the dark
choices.description: Spend it all in one warding pulse.
